next_steps: Commit the contents of the rendered/ directory into 'gitops/' of https://git-server.evidence-gitops.svc.cluster.local:8443/gitops.git and let the Argo CD controller reconcile it.
Verify application health in the Argo CD UI and the platform dashboards for the 'dev' environment.
